citation_tightness.note: All factual claims have adjacent citations. No missing citations observed.

completeness.note: Missing key safety concerns (e.g., pancreatitis, gallbladder disease) and limitations of evidence. Regulatory status is mentioned but lacks context on approval criteria.

flow.note: Logical progression from efficacy to safety to long-term outcomes. However, transition between safety and cardiovascular benefits feels abrupt.

hedging_appropriateness.note: Prose appropriately balances confidence with hedging (e.g., 'shows promise', 'generally mild-to-moderate'). No overconfidence detected.

tone_consistency.note: Tone remains evidence-grounded throughout, avoiding promotional language. Factual statements are presented neutrally.
